vocab.meaning: một món đồ kỷ niệm có tính ứng dụng cao
vocab.example: I received a rugged digital watch from my brother; it’s a practical keepsake that I use every time I go hiking.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thanh lịch, không phô trương
vocab.example: My partner gifted me a slim analog watch that exudes understated elegance, perfect for formal business meetings.

vocab.meaning: đóng vai trò như một lời nhắc nhở liên tục
vocab.example: The smartwatch I got for my birthday serves as a constant reminder to stay active and hit my daily step goals.

vocab.meaning: một món trang sức bền bỉ với thời gian
vocab.example: To me, a high-quality watch is more than a tool; it’s an enduring piece of jewelry that I’ll likely pass down to my children.

vocab.meaning: đánh dấu một sự chuyển giao/thay đổi quan trọng
vocab.example: Receiving a professional timepiece upon entering the corporate world really helped mark a significant transition in my life.
